title: Chemistry CLI and Scripting Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for chemistry-related CLI commands and scripts.

commands.description: Calculate molecular weight using Open Babel
commands.scenario: Calculate molecular weight using Open Babel

commands.command:
from rdkit import Chem
from rdkit.Chem import Descriptors
mol = Chem.MolFromSmiles('C6H6')
weight = Descriptors.MolWt(mol)
print(weight)

from chempy import Substance
water = Substance.from_formula('H2O')
print(water.molar_mass())

from rdkit import Chem
from rdkit.Chem import AllChem
rxn = AllChem.ReactionFromSmarts('[C:1]=[C:2].[O:3]>>[C:1][O:3][C:2]')
products = rxn.RunReactants((Chem.MolFromSmiles('C=C'), Chem.MolFromSmiles('O')))
for product in products:
    print(Chem.MolToSmiles(product[0]))

commands.description: Run a reaction simulation with Open Babel
commands.scenario: Run a reaction simulation with Open Babel

commands.command:
from chempy.kinetics.ode import get_odesys
from chempy.kinetics.rates import MassAction
from chempy import Reaction
rxn = Reaction({'A': 1, 'B': 1}, {'C': 1}, MassAction(1.0))
odesys, extra = get_odesys([rxn])
print(odesys)
commands.description: Simulate a chemical reaction using ChemPy
commands.scenario: Simulate a chemical reaction using ChemPy
